titleStmt.title: SII 9.395: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 395. (A.R. No. 370 of 1927.) ON A SLAB SET UP ON THE EAST SIDE OF THE INNER PRAKARA OF THE KOTESVARA TEMPLE AT KOTESVARA, A SUBURB OF COONDAPUR, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1183, Durmati, Mārgaśira, śu. 6 Maṅ[galavāra*] and Dhanurmāsa 3, Jupiter in Makara, corresponding to A.D. 1261 November 27 Tuesday. It refers itself to the joint rule of the senior queen Paṭṭamahādēvi and king Vīra-Pāṇḍyadēv-Āḷpēndradēva and states that when Voḍḍama-Śrīdēva, Narasiṅgaverggaḍe, other officers and priests had assembled, the three hundred of the town Kuḍikūru, its Heggaḍe and Kōṭi-Mēlaṇṭa set up the inscription fixing the total revenue of Kuḍikūr at gadyāṇas 180.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . svasti śrīmatpi
riyarisi paṭṭamahādēviyaruṁ (.) sva
sti śrīmatpāṁḍyacakravarttiyari
rāyagajakēsari vīrapāṁḍyadēvā
ḷpēṁdradēvarasara vijayarājyamuttarōttaraṁ
pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁba
raṁ saltamirddu . śakavaruṣada 1183 neya
makaradalu bruhaspatiyirddu durmmatisa
ṁvatsara mārggaśira su 6 maṁ . dhanu
māsa 3 neya maṁ daṁdu śrīmatu rā
jadhāni bārahakaṁnyāpuradaramaneya
lu sthirasiṁhāsanārūḍharāgi vaḍḍōlagaṁ
goṭṭire śrīpādasa(ṁ)nnidhānadalu ma
yduna voḍḍamaśrīdēva narasiṁga
verggaḍe māradaṁmaAdhikāri yi
ṁtivaru mukhyavāda samasta pradhāna
ruṁ purōhitaruṁ yire kuḍikū
ragrāma mu(ṁ)nnūrvvaruṁ kuḍikūra poḷa
la heggaḍe kuḍikūra kōṭimēlaṁṭa
nuṁ baraysida śāsanakramaveṁteṁdeḍe vari
ṣavoṁdakke tidduva samadāya gadyāṇa
ṁ nūṟaEṁbhattu ga 180 yī
mariyādeya tappisida Arasu pra
dhāni Adhikāri vūrāḷanu samadāya hecsida
varige gaṁge vāraṇāsiya taḍiyalu sāyira kavi
leya koṁda pāpa yī grāmavanitta pāpa yiṁ
tivarubhayānmatadiṁ barada śrīkaraṇada mācaiyya
sēnabōva . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.395 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
